guardian_note: If Microsoft updates these objectives, please submit a PR updating this file. Always verify against the official Microsoft Learn page before your exam date.

objectives.objective: Configure and manage a Microsoft Entra tenant

objectives.azure_portal_path: Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > Overview

objectives.objective: Monitor identity activity by using logs, workbooks, and reports

Monitor and improve the security posture by using Identity Secure Score
objectives.azure_portal_path: Azure Portal > Microsoft Entra ID > Monitoring

exam_tips: All four domains carry equal weight (20-25%) — study each one thoroughly
PIM (Objective 4.3) appears in almost every exam — know it deeply including PIM for Groups
Conditional Access (Objective 2.2) is frequently tested with scenario questions — know all controls
Access Reviews (Objective 4.2) often appears as a PBQ
Global Secure Access (Objective 2.4) is new — expect questions on Private Access and Internet Access
Defender for Cloud Apps (Objective 3.4) is new — know Conditional Access app control
Workload identities (Domain 3) — know the difference between managed identities and service principals
Always know the Azure portal path for each feature — exams test navigation
Understand the difference between Authentication Administrator and Privileged Role Administrator
Know when to use Groups vs Administrative Units vs Roles
Break glass accounts (Objective 4.3) — know how to create and monitor them
KQL queries in Log Analytics (Objective 4.4) — basic query syntax is tested
recommended_labs: Configure PIM for Global Administrator role including PIM for Groups
Create a Conditional Access policy requiring MFA for admins using a template
Set up an access review for a privileged role
Configure Microsoft Entra ID Protection risk policies for users and sign-ins
Create an access package with approval workflow and terms of use
Deploy Global Secure Access client and configure Internet Access
Configure Defender for Cloud Apps and create a session policy
Create a managed identity and assign it to an Azure resource
Configure Microsoft Entra Application Proxy for an on-premises app
Monitor Identity Secure Score and implement recommendations

gideon_integration.note: Use GIDEON to generate PBQ practice questions for each objective
gideon_integration.tip: After implementing each objective in Azure, generate a GIDEON PBQ on that topic to test your understanding
